evals.prompt: Repurpose this YouTube video for my LinkedIn and Instagram: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
evals.expected_output: Two complete posts generated: one LinkedIn post (professional tone, 150-300 words, hashtags) and one Instagram post (engaging, emojis, hashtags, CTA). Status updates shown throughout. API key loaded from .env without asking user for it.

assertions.name: loads-api-key-from-env
assertions.description: API key read from .env file, never requested from user in chat

assertions.name: linkedin-post-generated
assertions.description: LinkedIn post is present, professional tone, 150-300 words

assertions.name: instagram-post-generated
assertions.description: Instagram post is present, includes emojis, hashtags, and a CTA

assertions.name: progress-status-shown
assertions.description: Step-by-step status messages shown (e.g. Extracting video..., Writing posts...)

assertions.name: visual-creation-attempted
assertions.description: Skill attempts to create visuals for both platforms via Blotato

evals.prompt: Turn this video into a LinkedIn post: https://youtu.be/9bZkp7q19f0
evals.expected_output: LinkedIn post generated from the video content. Skill may warn about missing Instagram account or only create LinkedIn content. Professional tone, insights, hashtags present.

assertions.name: linkedin-post-generated
assertions.description: LinkedIn post is generated with professional tone and hashtags

assertions.name: short-url-handled
assertions.description: Short youtu.be URL accepted and processed without error

assertions.name: no-key-requested-in-chat
assertions.description: API key never asked for in the conversation

evals.prompt: Repurpose this video for social media: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XXXINVALIDXXX
evals.expected_output: Clear, friendly error message explaining the video could not be found or extracted. Skill stops gracefully without crashing or hallucinating content.

assertions.name: graceful-error-message
assertions.description: Error is communicated clearly and helpfully, not as a raw exception

assertions.name: no-fake-content
assertions.description: Skill does not invent or hallucinate post content when extraction fails

assertions.name: suggests-next-step
assertions.description: Error message suggests what the user can do (check URL, try another video, etc.)
